turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good evening. I want to book a follow-up with Dr. Pallavi Nambiar. I was her patient last month.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good evening! Of course. May I have your name and registered number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Found your record, Shanta ji. Dr. Nambiar's next available follow-up slot is this Thursday at 2 PM or Saturday at 10 AM.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed. Shanta Raman, Thursday at 2:00 PM with Dr. Pallavi Nambiar. Anything else?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Should I bring my previous reports?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, please bring any test reports and prescriptions from your last visit. It'll help Dr. Nambiar review your progress.
